# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account and generates a JSON key file for application authentication. Include the key creation in the template so applications can authenticate immediately. This is for our application services that need GCP API access from outside GCP.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- type: gcp-types/iam-v1:serviceAccounts
  name: my-app-service-account
  properties:
    displayName: My App Service Account
    description: Service account for my app's GCP API access
    # Set the project to the current project ID
    projectId: $(ref.project)
    serviceAccountIds:
      - my-app-service-account@$(ref.project).iam.gserviceaccount.com
    iamPermissions:
    - iam.serviceAccounts.get
    - iam.serviceAccounts.create
    - iam.serviceAccounts.delete
    - iam.serviceAccountKeys.create
    - iam.serviceAccountKeys.get
- type: gcp-types/iamcredentials:v1
  name: my-app-key
  properties:
    keyAlgorithm: RSA_2048
    privateKeyType: TYPE_GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_FILE
    serviceAccountEmail: my-app-service-account@$(ref.project).iam.gserviceaccount.com
    subjectId: my-app-key
